name: Design partner inquiry
about: Discuss design partner status for your organisation

**Organisation type** (do not name your organisation if you prefer confidentiality)
- [ ] Defence / aerospace
- [ ] Critical infrastructure
- [ ] Financial services
- [ ] Healthcare
- [ ] Public sector / government
- [ ] Systems integrator
- [ ] Other: ___

**Deployment context**
Describe your deployment environment (on-premise, air-gapped, sovereign cloud, etc.)

**What you need from Sentinel**
What trace schema fields, storage backends, or policy evaluation patterns does your use case require?

**Timeline**
When do you need this capability? Is there a compliance deadline driving adoption?
